thought: The discount amount is visibly incorrect after coupon application.
expected_check: Discount should be -$20 for one $100 jacket with SUMMER20.

bug.title: Coupon applies incorrect discount
bug.expected: SUMMER20 should reduce a $100 subtotal by $20.
bug.actual: The order summary shows Discount -$10 after applying SUMMER20.
bug.reason: The pricing logic appears to apply the wrong discount amount.
